title: Arkiv ETHNS Web3 Database Builder Challenge
valuePath: USDC prize claim if accepted externally
proofNeeded: Public repo, working Braga demo, README setup, live Arkiv entities, project-scoped queries, and 2-3 minute demo video.
publicBoundary: Only challenge requirements, public-safe proof summaries, artifact hashes, and Arkiv refs are public.

title: Protocol bounty proof pack
proofNeeded: Source requirements, bounded proof run, verifier result, redacted maintainer packet.
publicBoundary: Sample only. No private bounty intelligence or payout details.

title: Grant application proof review
valuePath: Credit, access, or grant decision if accepted
proofNeeded: Eligibility checks, public-safe claim review, evidence hash list, reviewer decision event.
publicBoundary: Sample only. Draft applications and private notes stay outside Arkiv.
